fixture: 063_in_subquery

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER NOT NULL, customer_id INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO orders VALUES (10, 1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO orders VALUES (11, 3)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO orders VALUES (12, 3)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT 1 IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] true

statement 6:
  sql:
    SELECT 2 IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] false

statement 7:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM orders WHERE id = 11 AND customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders WHERE customer_id = 3)
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 11
